project_lyfio: Lyfio is a project that allows users to easily monitor expenses using tables and specialized graphs.
project_missya: MissYa is a simple project that lets users send a link with a custom message and a countdown to their loved ones until they meet again.
project_monobank: Monobank revolutionizes Monopoly. The banker starts a game, and players join via code. The app simplifies financial management and money transfers between players.
project_panap: Panap is a complex pantry management app. Users can view recipes, add items to a shopping cart, and get weekly menu suggestions automatically.
project_sloopy: Sloopy fruits is a slot machine simulator where players pull a lever to hit winning combinations, featuring various gameplay modifications.
project_wp_site: Personal website is a simple site built using WordPress.
project_zmejelov: Zmejelov is a multi-year project that culminated in my thesis. It is a suite of 5 challenging, themed games combining various technologies and creativity.

sec1_text: I value your privacy. I only use cookies to see how many people visit tilensmole.uk and to show you YouTube videos.
sec2_analytics: Analytics: I use Google Analytics 4 to see which projects you like most. This uses your IP address (anonymized).
sec2_embed: Embedded Content: YouTube videos on this site may set cookies if you choose to watch them.
sec3_text: I do not sell, trade, or share your data with anyone except the processors mentioned above (Google Analytics, YouTube).
sec4_text: This site may link to external websites. I am not responsible for the privacy practices of those sites.
sec5_text: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data.
sec6_text: For any privacy-related questions, you can reach me at:
video_disallow_text: Please enable cookies to watch videos
